_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of ML platform components including feature stores, model registries, experiment tracking systems, model serving infrastructure, and pipeline orchestration frameworks.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-016 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-K-006 (AB, cosine: 0.479), TF-K-012 (TF, cosine: 0.458).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.496). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, systems]. DCWF-only terms [embedded] vs WIDAI-only terms [components, experiment, feature, frameworks, infrastructure, ml] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.892 (P=0.942, R=0.848). P exceeds R by 0.095 — the DCWF element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of embedded systems." and "Knowledge of ML platform components including feature stores, model registries," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.482 ≈ STS 0.496 (gap 0.015). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge, systems] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.0%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, systems]. DCWF-only: [embedded]. WIDAI-only: [components, experiment, feature, frameworks, infrastructure, ml].
